name: Beijing Baolande Software Corporation
summary: Beijing Baolande Software Corporation engages in the research and development, and sale of infrastructure software products in China, Nepal, Pakistan, and internationally. The company offers Web middleware, a HTTP protocol to support the EJB technology; application runtime platform software; application performance management technology, a real-time online monitoring technology; and service availability management platform, which provides proactive detection services for enterprise-class users. It also provides application server software, CORBA transaction middleware, message middleware, cloud management platform, APM, and distributed cache databases. In addition, the company offers BES application server, BES CloudLink, BES VBroker, BES WebGate, BES MQ, BES CacheDB, and other software products, as well as cloud computing technology. It serves telecommunication, financial, insurance, government, energy, and other industries. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Beijing, China.
